name: Pinball Breeze
short_description: Experimental pinball in relaxing environments, featuring customizable play fields, new mechanics, satisfying sound effects, and a forgiving tilt feature that encourages experimentation.
detailed_description:
A chill experimental pinball experience with a focus on playfield customization, solid mechanics, and satisfying sound effects.

Pinball Breeze has something for old school players and pinball newbies alike, with challenging objectives, new mechanics and a forgiving tilt feature that encourages experimentation. The table layouts range from the familiar feeling to outright absurd with asymmetrical and split well designs.

Table Modification

Hit those hard to reach objectives and top the high score list by placing a few features of your own in build mode, or beat a friend's high score by using their own modified layout. Wondering how someone beat your high score? Copy their table layout with the click of a button and see if you can top them. Better yet, improve on it and show them how to do it better.

Although every table was handcrafted to be fully navigable, you can mess up our beautiful designs with your insanity to get to those hard to reach places with a selection of extra parts.

Objective Based

Each table has its own set of objectives that open an exit when completed. At higher skill levels, an actual end point makes racking up a higher score more about great shots and careful part placement than just how long you can endure. Making the most of what you have and planning ahead becomes just as important as skill.

Tilt is your Dodge Roll

We reworked pinball's traditional tilt to act as a nudge or dodge mechanic with a very short cool down and no penalty. This allows you to have more control over the ball than you normally would in a traditional pinball game, no longer stuck just watching the action until the ball reaches a flipper. With more ways to interact with the ball, the game feels more dynamic than ever while still feeling like a solid game of pinball.

New Mechanics

Attractors, Repulsors, Cannons and Double-sided Slingshots along with orbiting planets, asymmetrical layouts and split well designs offer a refreshing take on the classic Pinball experience.

Bounce around the planets in a distant galaxy or draw lines in the sand as the sun sets over the beach. Each environment brings it's own charm, replacing the typically boisterous arcade atmosphere with chill vibes, ASMR-like soundscapes, and satisfying tactile surfaces.

Dim lights and smooth felt tabletops mimic the cozy feel of shooting pool with friends. Hard wood and slick lights merge the feel of a classic pinball table with the elegance of a billiards table.

Soft sands and lapping waves is an odd locale for Pinball, but feels oh so right with the chill vibes interspersed with the sounds of smashing sand castles and rolling along wooden planks. Light the torches and watch the sun set as you weave crisscrossing trails in the sand. Time moves forward as you finish objectives and heat the ball into rolling magma, making your trails react with a hot glow.

Navigate orbiting planets while sliding across the metal filigree of a cosmically vast clockwork device. More whimsical than the other environments, the stars becomes the backdrop to gravity centric features such as the attractor and repulsor. Flickering stars and shifting constellations punctuate completed objectives, as you navigate the strangest Pinball tables yet.

  • Physics that feel good - ricochet the pinball off slingshots, hug curves at high speed, and utilize momentum to get big hits off the flippers

  • Satisfying and consistent ball control

  • 12 tables over 3 environments

  • Objective based levels with reactive environments

  • Tilt is your friend here and not a cheat; direct your ball with tactical nudges

  • Choose your starting angle by launching the ball from a cannon on a turret

  • Play the table as-is or modify the table in build mode

  • New Pinball features like Gravity Wells, Repulsors, Cannons and Double-sided Slingshots

  • Local high score tables when playing offline

  • Steam Leaderboards for each level
